data.content:
Branch: worktree-foolery-6122-restart-recommendation-2
Commit: ac4b977a
Summary: suppresses the installer/update manual restart warning only when running on Debian Linux and systemctl can resolve foolery.service (system or user unit). Keeps the existing warning for Debian without the service and non-Debian Linux.
Verification: bun run lint; bun run tsc --noEmit (bunx unavailable); bun run test; bun run test:manual -- src/lib/__manual_tests__/install-restart-recommendation.test.ts; bun run build.
